exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph TD
    A[Client] -->|Request| B(API Gateway)
    B -->|Trigger| C(AWS Lambda)
    C -->|Read/Write| D(Amazon DynamoDB)
    C -->|Upload/Download| E(Amazon S3)
    C -->|Log| F(Amazon CloudWatch)
    F -->|Monitor| C
    B -->|Log| F
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style B fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style C fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style D fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style E fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
    style F fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
